author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Amargasaurus lived in what is now Argentina during the Early Cretaceous period, about 129 to 122 million years ago.
Amargasaurus was characterized by two parallel rows of tall, spiky spines running down its neck and back, which may have supported a skin sail.
